---
format:
  revealjs:
    title-slide: false
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <style>
          .keyboard-shell {
            flex: 1;
            min-height: 0;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 14px;
            padding: 18px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f9fcff 0%, #eef4f8 100%);
          }

          .keyboard-note {
            font-size: 15px;
            letter-spacing: 0.12em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #5d6d7e;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 12px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
          }

          .piano {
            position: relative;
            flex: 1;
            min-height: 360px;
            user-select: none;
          }

          .white-keys {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
            gap: 10px;
          }

          .piano-key {
            appearance: none;
            border: 0;
            padding: 0;
            font: inherit;
            cursor: pointer;
            outline: none;
            transition: transform 120ms ease, box-shadow 120ms ease, filter 120ms ease;
          }

          .piano-key:focus-visible {
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(43, 138, 138, 0.22);
          }

          .white-key {
            position: relative;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f4f7fb 100%);
            border: 1px solid #d7dee7;
            border-radius: 0 0 12px 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 #c7d0da, 0 14px 24px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.12);
            display: flex;
            align-items: end;
            justify-content: center;
            padding-bottom: 16px;
            color: #1f2937;
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.04em;
          }

          .white-key.pentatonic {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #e9fbf8 0%, #d8f4ee 100%);
            border-color: #7bcdbf;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 0 #55b9aa, 0 0 0 2px rgba(43, 138, 138, 0.12), 0 14px 24px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.12);
          }

          .black-key {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            width: calc((100% - 60px) / 7 * 0.62);
            height: 62%;
            border-radius: 0 0 10px 10px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #3a4250 0%, #10151d 100%);
            box-shadow: 0 6px 12px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.35);
            color: #f8fafc;
            z-index: 2;
            display: flex;
            align-items: end;
            justify-content: center;
            padding-bottom: 14px;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 700;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em;
          }

          .black-key[data-slot="1"] { left: calc((100% - 60px) / 7 * 0.70); }
          .black-key[data-slot="2"] { left: calc((100% - 60px) / 7 * 1.70); }
          .black-key[data-slot="4"] { left: calc((100% - 60px) / 7 * 4.04); }
          .black-key[data-slot="5"] { left: calc((100% - 60px) / 7 * 5.04); }
          .black-key[data-slot="6"] { left: calc((100% - 60px) / 7 * 6.04); }

          .piano-key.is-active {
            transform: translateY(2px);
            filter: brightness(1.08);
          }

          .piano-key.is-active.white-key {
            box-shadow: 0 3px 0 #c7d0da, 0 0 0 2px rgba(43, 138, 138, 0.24), 0 14px 24px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.12);
          }

          .piano-key.is-active.black-key {
            box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.4), 0 0 0 2px rgba(255, 183, 3, 0.25);
          }

          .scale-chips {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-top: 8px;
          }

          .scale-chip {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            min-width: 42px;
            padding: 6px 10px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: #f6f7f9;
            border: 1px solid #d9dee5;
            color: #4b5563;
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 700;
          }

          .scale-chip.pentatonic {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #e9fbf8 0%, #d8f4ee 100%);
            border-color: #7bcdbf;
            color: #12786d;
          }

          .backing-controls {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-top: 10px;
          }

          .backing-toggle {
            appearance: none;
            border: 0;
            border-radius: 999px;
            padding: 9px 16px;
            background: var(--color-teal);
            color: #ffffff;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 700;
            cursor: pointer;
          }

          .backing-toggle.is-playing {
            background: #1d4f50;
          }

          .backing-status {
            font-size: 15px;
            color: #4b5563;
            letter-spacing: 0.02em;
          }

          .backing-volume {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            margin-left: 6px;
          }

          .backing-volume-label {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #4b5563;
            white-space: nowrap;
          }

          .backing-volume-slider {
            width: 120px;
            accent-color: var(--color-teal);
            cursor: pointer;
          }
          </style>
          <script type="module">
          let audioContext = null;
          let backingIsPlaying = false;
          let backingAudio = null;
          const BACKING_TRACK_PATH = "deck_files/Groovy Neo Soul Backing Track in C Major I 85 BPM.mp3";

          const noteFrequency = {
            "C4": 261.63,
            "C#4": 277.18,
            "D4": 293.66,
            "D#4": 311.13,
            "E4": 329.63,
            "F4": 349.23,
            "F#4": 369.99,
            "G4": 392.00,
            "G#4": 415.30,
            "A4": 440.00,
            "A#4": 466.16,
            "B4": 493.88,
          };

          function ensureAudioContext() {
            if (!audioContext) {
              audioContext = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
            }
            if (audioContext.state === "suspended") {
              audioContext.resume();
            }
            return audioContext;
          }

          function pulseKey(key) {
            key.classList.add("is-active");
            window.setTimeout(() => key.classList.remove("is-active"), 180);
          }

          function playNote(note) {
            const context = ensureAudioContext();
            const frequency = noteFrequency[note];
            if (!frequency) return;

            const now = context.currentTime;
            const gain = context.createGain();
            const filter = context.createBiquadFilter();
            const carrier = context.createOscillator();
            const body = context.createOscillator();

            filter.type = "lowpass";
            filter.frequency.setValueAtTime(2400, now);

            carrier.type = "triangle";
            body.type = "sine";
            carrier.frequency.setValueAtTime(frequency, now);
            body.frequency.setValueAtTime(frequency / 2, now);

            gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.0001, now);
            gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.22, now + 0.03);
            gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, now + 1.1);

            carrier.connect(filter);
            body.connect(filter);
            filter.connect(gain);
            gain.connect(context.destination);

            carrier.start(now);
            body.start(now);
            carrier.stop(now + 1.2);
            body.stop(now + 1.2);
          }

          function updateBackingUi() {
            const button = document.getElementById("backing-toggle");
            const status = document.getElementById("backing-status");
            if (!button || !status) return;

            button.textContent = backingIsPlaying ? "Pause Backing Track" : "Play Backing Track";
            button.classList.toggle("is-playing", backingIsPlaying);

            if (!backingIsPlaying) {
              status.textContent = "Stopped";
            } else {
              status.textContent = "Playing C major backing track";
            }
          }

          function startBackingTrack() {
            if (backingIsPlaying) return;
            ensureAudioContext();
            if (!backingAudio) return;
            backingIsPlaying = true;
            backingAudio.play().catch(() => {
              backingIsPlaying = false;
              updateBackingUi();
            });
            updateBackingUi();
          }

          function stopBackingTrack() {
            backingIsPlaying = false;
            if (backingAudio) {
              backingAudio.pause();
              backingAudio.currentTime = 0;
            }
            updateBackingUi();
          }

          function bindBackingTrack() {
            const button = document.getElementById("backing-toggle");
            if (!button) return;

            backingAudio = new Audio(encodeURI(BACKING_TRACK_PATH));
            backingAudio.loop = true;
            backingAudio.preload = "auto";
            backingAudio.volume = 0.65;

            backingAudio.addEventListener("ended", () => {
              backingIsPlaying = false;
              updateBackingUi();
            });

            const volumeSlider = document.getElementById("backing-volume");
            if (volumeSlider) {
              volumeSlider.value = String(Math.round(backingAudio.volume * 100));
              volumeSlider.addEventListener("input", () => {
                const percent = Number(volumeSlider.value);
                backingAudio.volume = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, percent / 100));
              });
            }

            button.addEventListener("click", () => {
              if (backingIsPlaying) {
                stopBackingTrack();
              } else {
                startBackingTrack();
              }
            });

            updateBackingUi();
          }

          function bindKeyboard() {
            document.querySelectorAll(".piano-key").forEach((key) => {
              key.addEventListener("pointerdown", (event) => {
                event.preventDefault();
                pulseKey(key);
                playNote(key.dataset.note);
              });
            });
          }

          document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
            bindKeyboard();
            bindBackingTrack();
          });
          </script>
---

## 1.1 Pentatonic in C Major {.content}

```{=html}
<div class="top-bar">1. MUSIC PRODUCTION</div>
<div class="screenshot-row">
  <div class="callout-box">
    <div class="callout-label">
      <strong>C major pentatonic</strong> uses five notes: <strong>C, D, E, G, A</strong>.
      It is a simple scale for riffs, melodies, and improvisation because every note fits cleanly over C major harmony.
    </div>
    <div class="scale-chips" aria-label="C major pentatonic notes">
      <span class="scale-chip pentatonic">C</span>
      <span class="scale-chip pentatonic">D</span>
      <span class="scale-chip pentatonic">E</span>
      <span class="scale-chip">F</span>
      <span class="scale-chip pentatonic">G</span>
      <span class="scale-chip pentatonic">A</span>
      <span class="scale-chip">B</span>
    </div>
    <div class="backing-controls">
      <button id="backing-toggle" class="backing-toggle" type="button" aria-label="Play or pause C major backing track">Play Backing Track</button>
      <label class="backing-volume" for="backing-volume">
        <span class="backing-volume-label">Volume</span>
        <input id="backing-volume" class="backing-volume-slider" type="range" min="0" max="100" value="65" step="1" aria-label="Backing track volume">
      </label>
      <span id="backing-status" class="backing-status" aria-live="polite">Stopped</span>
    </div>
    <p class="concept-insight"><strong>*</strong> Click the highlighted keys to hear the scale. Try moving between notes in the order C, D, E, G, A.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="main-panel">
    <div class="keyboard-shell">
      <div class="keyboard-note">
        <span>One octave keyboard</span>
        <span>click a key to play the note</span>
      </div>
      <div class="piano" id="daw-keyboard" aria-label="One octave keyboard in C major">
        <div class="white-keys">
          <button class="piano-key white-key pentatonic" data-note="C4" aria-label="C4">C</button>
          <button class="piano-key white-key pentatonic" data-note="D4" aria-label="D4">D</button>
          <button class="piano-key white-key pentatonic" data-note="E4" aria-label="E4">E</button>
          <button class="piano-key white-key" data-note="F4" aria-label="F4">F</button>
          <button class="piano-key white-key pentatonic" data-note="G4" aria-label="G4">G</button>
          <button class="piano-key white-key pentatonic" data-note="A4" aria-label="A4">A</button>
          <button class="piano-key white-key" data-note="B4" aria-label="B4">B</button>
        </div>
        <button class="piano-key black-key" data-slot="1" data-note="C#4" aria-label="C sharp 4">C#</button>
        <button class="piano-key black-key" data-slot="2" data-note="D#4" aria-label="D sharp 4">D#</button>
        <button class="piano-key black-key" data-slot="4" data-note="F#4" aria-label="F sharp 4">F#</button>
        <button class="piano-key black-key" data-slot="5" data-note="G#4" aria-label="G sharp 4">G#</button>
        <button class="piano-key black-key" data-slot="6" data-note="A#4" aria-label="A sharp 4">A#</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
